name_en: Code: 666226. Medium, 🔗Millie Visetos Crossbody Bag, MCM's long history is revealed through every feature of the Millie series 😇. Made of lightweight Visetos material and accented with Nappa leather trim, it is a classic modern carry-all that combines dynamic portability with classic elegance. Small approx: 18.5x11.5x4cm Medium approx: 23.5x13.5x5cm Removable crossbody strap with chain and leather decoration, Laurel leaf lock closure, exterior back slit pocket, interior open pocket and zip pocket, interior card slot, leather trim, metal-tone hardware, fabric lining
